rule.description: [Sakura] Suspicious IMAP login from known Tor/exit node IP
rule.info: Attacker IP 185.220.101.x detected logging into mailbox from Tor exit node

rule.description: [Sakura] Mailbox login from Tor exit node — HIGH SEVERITY
rule.info: External IP detected accessing mail server from Tor network

rule.description: [Sakura] POSSIBLE BEC: linhntt mailbox accessed from suspicious IP
rule.info: BEC ATTACK: Compromised account linhntt@sakuratech.local accessed from foreign IP

rule.description: [Sakura] MAIL RULE ALERT: New email forwarding/filtering rule detected
rule.info: Attacker created mail forwarding rule for financial keywords

rule.description: [Sakura] CRITICAL: Email sent from linhntt@sakuratech.local via external IP
rule.info: BEC FRAUD: Compromised account used to send fraudulent email

rule.description: [Sakura] PHISHING ALERT: Email from typosquat domain sakura-vendor.com detected
rule.info: Phishing email detected from typosquat domain. SPF/DKIM likely failing.

rule.description: [Sakura] EMAIL SECURITY FAIL: SPF/DKIM/DMARC failure detected
rule.info: Email authentication failure - possible spoofing attempt

rule.description: [Sakura] SUSPICIOUS SENDER: Email from sakura-vendor.com (not our domain)
rule.info: Email from look-alike domain detected. Investigate immediately.

rule.description: [Sakura] WEBMAIL ACCESS: Roundcube accessed from suspicious IP
rule.info: Webmail access from foreign IP detected

rule.description: [Sakura] MAILBOX CHANGE: Email deletion detected in linhntt mailbox
rule.info: Mailbox data deletion - possible evidence removal attempt

rule.description: [Sakura] BRUTE FORCE: Multiple failed login attempts on linhntt mailbox
rule.info: Possible brute force or credential stuffing attack on linhntt account

rule.description: [Sakura] EXTERNAL FORWARD: Email being forwarded to external email service
rule.info: Email auto-forwarding rule may be sending data to external address
